tags.name: Title
tags.value: Some talk regarding the recent Arweave storage cost increase

tags.name: Description
tags.value: The Arweave network price might be in a positive feedback loop, the price keeping on climbing.. It seems that some miners have been leaving the network, the node count now barely above 200 when it used to be around 350 at the start of the year (source: viewblock.io). Concerning times...
